user_prompt: synthesize audio, 440 Hz for one channel, 660 Hz for the other channel
generate a file with 10 seconds of audio, then decode it
the serial port should indicate progress and also how long it took to decode for each test.
then do the same test for:
If a particular test exceeded 5 minute to decode, let it finish but do not execute the next test
The progress callback should be used to output progress
agent_reply: - Synthesizes 440 Hz on odd/MIC/left and 660 Hz on even/BT/right.
- Runs `AudioFileDecoder`, prints progress through the decoder progress callback, and prints elapsed decode time per case.
- Stops launching later cases if one decode takes more than 5 minutes, after letting that decode finish.
- Reuses `/decoder_bench.rec`, `/decoder_bench.wav`, and `/temp.wav` to avoid accumulating all benchmark files.
